activity_id: A unique identifier for each wellness activity conducted by the company
activity_name: The name of the wellness activity
activity_year: The year in which the wellness activity was conducted
activity_organizer: The name of the person or department who organized the wellness activity
target_department: The department for which the wellness activity was conducted
activity_platform: The social media platforms where updates about the activity were published
activity_purpose: The purpose of the wellness activity
Promoting physical fitness and fun competition
Promoting proper posture and reducing risk of injury
Promoting physical fitness and environmental awareness
